name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shortcut (lnk) File
notes: This Building Block detects new processes created from shortcut (lnk) files. Processes typically used by adversaries, such as powershell, cmd, mshta should be monitored.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shortcut (lnk) File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Access Success
when the event matches LOWER("File Extension") MATCHES '.*?\.lnk$' AQL filter query
when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '.*?powershell.*' OR LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '.*?cmd.*' OR LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '.*?mshta.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Critical Process Created by Shortcut (lnk) File on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Object Access Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("File Extension") MATCHES '.*?\.lnk$' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '.*?powershell.*' OR LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '.*?cmd.*' OR LOWER("Process Name") MATCHES '.*?mshta.*' AQL filter query
